evals.prompt: Is the Citizens Bank demo ready to run? Check everything.
evals.expected_output: Status report covering connectivity, all 4 indices with doc counts vs expected, demo_critical_docs spot-check (VND-0412), ML job state and last bucket age, ELSER endpoint allocation and warm latency, Kibana dashboard reachability. Overall status GREEN or AMBER with specific fix commands for anything failing.
assertions: Status report printed with ✅/❌/⚠️ per resource category
Each index checked: existence + doc count vs seed_document_count
demo_critical_docs spot-checked by _id (VND-0412 specifically called out)
ML job state and datafeed state reported separately
ELSER endpoint allocation status and warm latency measured
Any ❌ item accompanied by a specific paste-ready fix command
Overall READY / NOT READY verdict at the end
All resource names prefixed correctly (cb- prefix if INDEX_PREFIX=cb-)

evals.prompt: Quick check — did the Lowe's deploy work? The ML job is the thing I'm most worried about.
evals.expected_output: Status report with ML section prominently surfaced. inventory-shrink-monitor job state, datafeed running, last bucket timestamp, anomaly score on store 1842 SKUs 174239/182041/196723 reported. Other checks also run. If ML not yet trained (no bucket results), clear explanation of what to do next.
assertions: ML section shows job state (open/closed) and datafeed state (started/stopped)
Last bucket timestamp shown with age in human-readable form (e.g., '2h ago')
Anomaly score on target entities reported (or 'no results yet — datafeed may need more time')
ELSER endpoint checked (lowes-elser-v2-endpoint with lowes- prefix)
All index names use lowes- prefix from INDEX_PREFIX
